So as you get older and more successful in life, you go from opportunity scarce to opportunity abundant. Meaning, when you're when you're young, you don't really have a lot of cool opportunities or things you could say yes to. So, you just need to be in the mindset of saying yes to a lot of stuff. Or you just get more and more opportunities coming your way and you have to go the opposite way. You basically have to practice saying no. And so this creates what I call the yes test.
